sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  /* ================= PAGE ================= */

  pageWrapper:
    "min-h-screen bg-slate-50 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-10 py-6 sm:py-8",

  container:
    "max-w-7xl mx-auto",

  /* ================= TITLE ================= */

  title:
    "text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl font-semibold text-slate-900",

  navPath:
    "text-sm sm:text-base font-medium mt-2",

  /* ================= FORM ================= */

  formWrapper:
    "mt-6 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-4 sm:p-6",

  formGrid:
    "grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 items-end",

  input:
    "w-full h-12 px-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white text-sm sm:text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500 transition",

  select:
    "w-full h-12 px-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white text-sm sm:text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500 transition appearance-none cursor-pointer",

  buttonDark:
    "h-12 px-6 rounded-xl bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white text-sm sm:text-base font-medium transition",

  buttonCancel:
    "h-12 px-6 rounded-xl bg-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-300 text-slate-700 text-sm sm:text-base font-medium transition",

  /* ================= TABLE ================= */

  tableWrapper:
    "mt-6 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden",

  tableHeader:
    "hidden md:grid grid-cols-4 px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase bg-slate-50",

  tableRow:
    "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 items-center px-6 py-4 text-sm sm:text-base border-t",

  badgeActive:
    "inline-flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700",

  badgeInactive:
    "inline-flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-red-100 text-red-700",

  emptyState:
    "py-16 text-center text-slate-400 text-sm sm:text-base",
};
